specific_question: How many customers used the direct messaging feature in the CRM to contact a Sales Representative during the month of July 2025?
answer: In July 2025, 46 customers used the direct messaging feature to speak with a live Sales Representative from Elexion Automotive.
dr_question: By the end of 2025, how can Elexion Automotive use data generated through its customer relationship management system to analyze customer behavior online and identify patterns that drive sales?
